enhance.label: Enhance
enhance.long_question: What does the artifact enhance, amplify, intensify, or accelerate?
examples: an LLM agent enhances rate of code-writing per developer-hour
vector search enhances recall over keyword search

obsolesce.label: Obsolesce
obsolesce.long_question: What does it render obsolete, displace, or push to the side?
examples: embedding-based retrieval obsolesces hand-tuned BM25 parameters
agentic coding obsolesces some boilerplate review labor

retrieve.label: Retrieve
retrieve.long_question: What previously obsolesced practice or sensibility does it bring back?
examples: long-context LLMs retrieve the read-the-whole-thing reading style

reverse.label: Reverse
reverse.long_question: When pushed to its limits, what does it flip into?
examples: infinite agentic loops reverse into wasted compute and reward hacking
perfectly fluent text reverses into indistinguishability and trust erosion

tiers.llm: LLM-assisted (Ollama local + position-swap + Judge Reliability Harness)

figure_ground.figure: Figure (enhance + retrieve dominant) — the foregrounded effect
figure_ground.ground: Ground (obsolesce + reverse dominant) — the background shift
figure_ground.both: Both figure and ground are high — strong, simultaneous change
figure_ground.unclear: All four are low — span carries little tetrad signal
